title: [ExportVerilog]  CIRCT may generate wrong RTL codes for if/else mux chain.

features.name: priority encoder chain with indexed register write
features.description: Code should include an if-else-if chain inside clocked always block where multiple conditions write to the same register via dynamic index

features.name: dynamic array index in procedural block
features.description: Code should include a register array accessed via a dynamic index variable in a clocked always block

features.name: flattened ternary replacing priority if-else
features.description: Code should include a ternary expression used as replacement for priority if-else chain in combinational logic
features.snippet:
wire [W-1:0] _GEN = sel ? val1 : val2;
r <= idx == 2'h0 ? _GEN : r;

features.name: chisel-style when-otherwise priority chain
features.description: Code should include multiple when blocks with otherwise branches writing to the same indexed register element
